title: Endometriosis symptom review

presenting_history.text: Supports chronic pelvic pain, dysmenorrhoea affecting activities, deep dyspareunia, bowel or urinary cyclical symptoms, infertility and quality-of-life context without diagnosing endometriosis.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports entered symptom and function context.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Supports chronic pelvic pain, dysmenorrhoea affecting activities, deep dyspareunia, bowel or urinary cyclical symptoms, infertility and quality-of-life context without diagnosing endometriosis.

examination.text: Supports clinician-performed abdominal or pelvic examination and recommendation-qualified transvaginal or transabdominal ultrasound while recognizing that a normal examination or scan does not exclude endometriosis.
examination.rationale: Supports clinician-performed examination and selected imaging without exclusion inference.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-performed abdominal or pelvic examination and recommendation-qualified transvaginal or transabdominal ultrasound while recognizing that a normal examination or scan does not exclude endometriosis.

referral.text: Supports clinician-decided referral, preference discussion and review in qualified contexts without selecting treatment or urgency automatically.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician-decided referral and review only.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-decided referral, preference discussion and review in qualified contexts without selecting treatment or urgency automatically.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.5.9 onward — referral and management pathway

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Confirmation status, pregnancy, symptom pattern, examination, imaging, fertility goals and treatment are absent.
No diagnosis, exclusion, imaging, medicine, surgery or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
